query: INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, loredexEntryId, era, season, disciplines, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('evt-fall-reality-lore-90018', 'The Fall of Reality', 'event', 'mythic', 'chaos', 'fire', 'reality', 'none', 'unknown', NULL, 10, 0, 0, 'Apocalypse: Destroy ALL characters, locations, and items in play. Inception Arks: Each player may save up to 2 characters from destruction by placing them face-down (they enter Inception Arks). New Dawn: After resolution, each player draws 5 cards.', '"Reality itself shattered. The Panopticon fell. The Arks launched. And nothing was ever the same."', NULL, 'entity_104', 'Fall of Reality', 'Season 1', '["Apocalypse", "Rebirth", "Dimensional Collapse"]', '["mass-destruction", "board-wipe", "save", "draw", "mythic-event"]', 'achievement', 1);

Inception Arks: Each player may save up to 2 characters from destruction by placing them face-down (they enter Inception Arks). New Dawn: After resolution, each player draws 5 cards.', '"Reality itself shattered. The Panopticon fell. The Arks launched. And nothing was ever the same."', NULL, 'entity_104', 'Fall of Reality', 'Season 1', '["Apocalypse", "Rebirth", "Dimensional Collapse"]', '["mass-destruction", "board-wipe", "save", "draw", "mythic-event"]', 'achievement', 1);
